meaning: adj.(指气味、味道)刺激性的,辛辣的,尖锐的,苦痛的,严厉的
examples: Nearby was a factory which exuded a pungent smell.
The goats, scenting the pungent herbs, also hurried up without delay.
I could smell pungent durian fruit, grilled satay and lemon detergent as my shoulder slapped against a line of wet laundry.
Benton Brothers Fine Cheese stocks pungent offerings from across Canada and around the world.
When my nose first got a whiff of its pungent, acidic odour, my stomach began to churn.
